---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SupraWall
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing. Example: "I need to enforce policies based on the content of tool arguments, not just the tool name."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe your specific use case. Which framework are you using? What kind of agents? What industry/compliance requirements?

- **Framework:** (LangChain / AutoGen / CrewAI / Vercel AI / other)
- **Industry:** (fintech / healthcare / legal / other)
- **Compliance:** (EU AI Act / SOC 2 / HIPAA / other)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
